programme.title: Behind the Music
programme.desc: I sin sista intervju berättar Rob Pilatus tillsammans med kollegan Fabrice Morvan om Milli Vanillis uppgång och fall. De toppade listorna med 'Girl You Know It's True', men blev ökända när de avslöjades som mimare.

programme.title: Ink Master: Redemption
programme.sub-title: Man får det man betalar för
programme.desc: Saker och ting går vilt till när Gentle Jay kommer tillbaka till Ink Masters studio för att möta inte bara en utan tre missnöjda dukar.

programme.title: Ink Master: Redemption
programme.desc: Det blir en fråga om heder när Lydia Bruno och Lalo återvänder för att gottgöra tatueringarna de märkt några veteraner med.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.sub-title: Put Your Ink Where Your Mouth Is
programme.desc: Tävlingen testar konstnärernas förmåga att marknadsföra sig själva när makten ligger i händerna på canvasen. Kampen fortsätter om 100 000 dollar och titeln bläckmästare.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: Med bara fem deltagare kvar är kampen om 100 000 dollar och titeln Ink Master i säsong 12 intensivare än någonsin tidigare. Konstnärerna får klara sig själva i ett test av finess.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: Herrlaget tar sikte på kvinnorna i en illustrativ porträttutmaning. Kampen fortsätter om 100 000 dollar och titeln Ink Master.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: De fyra sista artisterna som återstår kämpar i ett tatueringsmaraton för att säkra sin plats i säsongsfinalen.

programme.title: Help! I'm In A Secret Relationship
programme.desc: Kaitlins och Cams Vegas-romans utvecklas till något mer och Kaitlin tror sig ha träffat sin drömprins. Kaitlin kan se en framtid med Cam men problemet är att han hemlighåller henne och skälet är inte direkt rosenskimrande.

programme.title: Help! I'm In A Secret Relationship
programme.desc: Lee kände att hon träffat sin drömtjej när hon mötte Princess för två år sedan. Efter att de flyttat tvärs över landet till LA är Lee redo att börja en framtid ihop. Men problemet är att Princess hemlighåller henne och hon vill veta varför.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Carmen är orolig över sin kusin Antwanes treåriga romans med en man vid namn Tony. Antwane lever ett liv helt frånkopplad från nätet, vilket gör det svårt att avslöja Tonys identitet. Är Tony verkligen den han påstår sig vara?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Kiana är övertygad om att hennes fru Sparkayla kattfiskas av en tjej som påstår sig vara hennes sedan länge försvunna syster. Nev och Kamie genomför sitt första DNA-test i Catfish historia för att finna de verkliga rötterna till detta familjesvek.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Ett mystiskt mejl gör att Nev och Laura hjälper Derek hitta nätkärleken Annabelle. Efter en sexig Snapchatskandal och svek blir upplösningen inte som Derek hade kunnat drömma om.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: En oroad son hör av sig när hans mammas nätpojkvän verkar mer än lovligt skum. Men mamma har också hemligheter, och när Nev och Max hittar mannen får allt en bisarr och chockartad vändning.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Shawny har nyligen separerat från sin make. Nev och Max hjälper henne att ta reda på mer om hennes nya kärlek, men det blir intressant när de upptäcker att Shawny kan ha hemligheter själv.

programme.title: Caught In The Act: Double Life
programme.sub-title: Jag tillåter inte att du leker med mig!
programme.desc: Cindy hjälpte sin hemlöse vän och blev kär. Men nu uppträder Esteban underligt. Cindys bästa vän Monique är övertygad om att nåt är fel - så de vänder sig till Tamar för att avslöja sanningen. Lever han ett dubbelliv?

programme.title: Caught In The Act: Unfaithful
programme.desc: Ava har drömt om att bilda familj med sin fästmö Maria. Men Ava behöver veta om livet hon har drömt om har varit en lögn.

programme.title: Caught In The Act: Unfaithful
programme.desc: Radioprataren Jojo ifrågasätter sitt förhållande med promotorn Claude. Jobbar Claude för sin familj eller på en väg ut?

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I ett rykande färskt 'Ridiculousness' ska Rob, Steelo och gästen Camille Kostek dansa loss med professionella 'Dansförgörare', försöka låta bli att svettas i 'Miniträning' och löpa linan ut i 'Zipsnillen'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I ett nytt avsnitt av Ridiculousness laddar Rob, Steelo och Camille Kostek för 'Ansiktsträffar', hyllar världens knasigaste björnar i 'Pandafall' och kraschar med sina 10-växlade i 'Nedcykling'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I ett nytt avsnitt av Ridiculousness flippar Rob, Steelo och gästen Rocsi Diaz ur när de drabbas av 'Bordsvrede', blir lite glömska och behöver 'Plötsliga påminnelser' och försöker att inte bli knivhuggna av 'Knivhuggarbarn'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I ett nytt avsnitt av Ridiculousness hälsar Rob och Steelo Rocsi Diaz välkommen för att bevittna lagkamrater sabba för varann i 'Lagkamratssabotage', uppskattar skönheten runt omkring oss i 'Vardagsförundran' och har en kul dagsfylla i 'Brunch-full'.

programme.title: MTV Unplugged
programme.desc: Detta 45 minuter långa akustiska framträdande med brittiska superstjärnan Sting spelades in i New York i mars 1991 i en intim studiomiljö.

programme.title: Ink Master: Redemption
programme.sub-title: Man får det man betalar för
programme.desc: Saker och ting går vilt till när Gentle Jay kommer tillbaka till Ink Masters studio för att möta inte bara en utan tre missnöjda dukar.

programme.title: Ink Master: Redemption
programme.desc: Det blir en fråga om heder när Lydia Bruno och Lalo återvänder för att gottgöra tatueringarna de märkt några veteraner med.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I ett nytt 'Ridiculousness' provar Rob Dyrdek, Steelo Brim och Carly Aquilino lyckan 'I mörka vatten', testar om det funkar i 'Fortfarande bra nog' och får flygmil i 'Försenad flight-träning'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I ett nytt 'Ridiculousness delar Rob, Steelo och Carly Aquilino med sig av skräcken för att ramla ned i hål i 'Hål in one', Rob avslöjar en ny försäkringsplan i 'Påbucklad' och sen diskuteras en slummer i 'Tupplur på jobbet'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I detta avsnitt av' Ridiculousness' välkomnar Rob, Steelo och Nina Agdal Angelina från 'Jersey Shore' för att halsa, 'Häva och missa', luta sig lite för mycket bakåt i 'Onykter och ostadig' och ta skydd för 'Spyattack'.

programme.title: Caught In The Act: Unfaithful
programme.desc: Neko har varit vän med Kara i 10 år, så när de började dejta för ett år sen litade han på henne. Ända sen Kara började som strippa och frisör har Neko funderat på om hon gått över gränser med sina välbeställda kunder.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: Det är en Snooki lös, några guidos sjunker i pappbåtar och Angelina ska hålla tal. JWOWW:s födelsedagsfirande har dragit i gång!

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: JWOWW:s födelsedagsfirande är på väg att spåra ut när Snooki's alter ego Dren dyker upp. Vinny är värd för den första och möjligen sista årliga Jersey Shore-talangjakt i Poconos och det börjar blir spänt mellan Dren och Angelina.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: Ett bråk hamnar i skymundan tack vare Vinny Guadagninos talanguppvisning, med en enastående insats av Snooki och ett tal från Angelina som ger "bombning" en ny innebörd.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: Resan närmar sig sitt slut och Snooki får städa upp röran hon har orsakat. Mike planerar ett andra könsavslöjande trots att alla vet att de ska få en pojke.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Deux amies de la scène et de la télévision, Ruth Madoc et Su Pollard, connues pour leurs apparitions dans la sitcom Hi-De-Hi, partent à la chasse aux antiquités avec Phil Serrell et Raj Bisram. Partis de Monmouth, ville frontalière du Pays de Galles, ils se rendent à Congleton, dans le Cheshire, pour une vente aux enchères.Ruth découvre également l'incroyable infirmière du XIXe siècle - et ce n'est pas Florence Nightingale - tandis que Su visite l'ancienne ville romaine de Caerleon et trouve le temps d'affronter Phil dans un amphithéâtre.Et Su tente de résoudre un vieux mystère... Phil porte-t-il une perruque ?

programme.title: Photo Contest
programme.desc: In this episode, the two candidates of the day, Thibaud Poirier and Antoine Guillou, will have one hour to realize their photo session. They will have to take the best possible photos on the imposed theme of architecture in the 12th district of Paris, and then they will have 30 minutes to edit their photos.

programme.title: Artist's Workshop
programme.desc: In the Artist's workshop series, we offer you a privileged meeting with an artist, or the discovery of an artist or an important place for the history of art. Whether they are painters, visual artists, sculptors... These people all have the same passion for art and this show is an opportunity to enter their different universes, to discover what drives them, inspires them and maybe that will give rise to vocations.

programme.title: An hour with
programme.desc: Take an hour break to discover the work of a French painter, Édouard Vuillard. You will discover his labour with Sleep, The Piano or Portrait de madame Henri Vaquez.

programme.title: An hour with
programme.desc: Take an hour break to discover the work of an Italian painter, Titien. You will discover his labour with Pastoral concert, The resurrection of Christ or Venus with organist.

programme.title: Video Art
programme.desc: Street art, performances, digital art... Because the new forms of Art and their invigorating character, even iconoclastic, have been able to attract a new public until now refractory to go inside the interior of our beautiful museums.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: 200 years after it opened and a century after acquiring its first Van Gogh works, the National Gallery hosted the largest Van Gogh exhibition ever held in the UK (September 14, 2024 to January 19, 2025). The exhibition was a huge success, unanimously praised by the press, and tickets sold out quickly, making this film the only way to see what Forbes called a “once-in-a-lifetime exhibition.”Discover the passion that drove one of the world's most beloved artists to revolutionize art. Van Gogh: Poets & Lovers rewrites history and celebrates Van Gogh's genius without exploiting his suffering, allowing audiences to truly understand this iconic artist in a whole new way...

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: Dans la seconde moitié du 19ème siècle, Edouard Manet (1832-1883) démontre une grande originalité dans ses peintures à représentation historique et ses portraits représentant des figures connues, comme le romancier Zola et le poète Mallarmé. Même s’il n’est pas reconnu comme étant le premier impressionniste, sa place de leader dans l’histoire de l’art se doit d’être souligné. Les scandales provoqués en 1863 par « Le Déjeuner sur l’herbe » ou « Olympia » tout deux exposés au Musée d'Orsay marque le début de la peinture moderne.Bonne visite !

programme.title: Architectures
programme.desc: Tapie au pied de la "Coline de l’éléphant

programme.title: Little Sketches
programme.desc: In 64 fun episodes, Gia-Haï Phan teaches you all the sketching techniques you need.

programme.title: Sketchbook
programme.desc: Raphael Federici (street artist), Marine Goodmorning (illustrator), Luca Fiore (cartoonist) and Harry Boudchicha (drawing teacher) reveal their best drawing techniques. Each episode focuses on a specific subject:movement, oil painting, shadows, hair... For the first 10 minutes, each artist gives a theoretical lesson illustrated by sketches. Then they each start working on their creation. Finally, they end with a debrief, comparingand explaining their techniques.

programme.title: Art Quiz
programme.desc: Test your knowledge and your memory in fine arts, architecture, photography, street art and a dozen other topics with our Art Quiz popups !

programme.title: My little Museum
programme.desc: My little Museum is Art History retold through funny anecdotes and backstage trivias by Alicia Flipo. With her wacky demeanor, her inventiveness and her quirky sense of humor, Alicia stages these small Art tales so that once and for all, you could remember the Big stories!

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: L'humoriste et animateur Jim Moir et sa femme Nancy Sorrell partent en road trip dans le Kent aujourd'hui.Mieux connu sous le nom de Vic Reeves, Jim apporte sa touche d'humour unique à l'achat d'antiquités. De son côté, Nancy, mannequin et présentatrice télé, sait aussi marchander et elle est très compétitive ! Le couple est accompagné par les experts Charlie Ross et Thomas Plant.Soyez attentif au don surprenant de Jim pour deviner l’âge de presque tout, à Dixon traversant les chutes du Niagara et à une leçon de navigation par longitude.Et surtout, la mystérieuse Mme Parker fera-t-elle son apparition à la vente aux enchères ?

programme.title: A special day
programme.desc: In this episode, we will spend a special day with Cécile Schall, director of Fotofever, a contemporary photography fair that opens its doors today. For Cécile, the stakes are high because she only has a few hours left to make sure everything is perfect. We will accompany her in her preparations.

programme.title: Museum stories
programme.desc: Since the beginning of its history, the Petit Palais has been imagined to highlight masterpieces of art. It is a true setting that magnifies creation in all its forms. Its extraordinary collection allows it to offer visitors a journey through the ages, confronting the great artists and the creative genius of all time, and thus breaking down the ages barrier.

programme.title: Veilhan A Venezia
programme.desc: Follow the artist Xavier Veilhan who represented France in 2017 at the Venice Art Biennale, an Italian foundation that organizes various artistic events in Venice.

programme.title: Masterpiece
programme.desc: Monet est le fondateur de l'impressionnisme, une forme d'art qui met l'accent sur l'expérience de l'instant, la vie moderne et la peinture en plein air. Ce tableau, réalisé lors d'un de ses nombreux séjours aux Pays-Bas, est un élément important de sa quête impressionniste. Charlotte, comme Monet, se rend sur les canaux pour peindre. L'équipe visite l'ancienne maison et l'atelier de Monet à Giverny, en France, et revient avec du matériel utile pour la reconstitution.

programme.title: Private Tour
programme.sub-title: Louvres Lens : Poland, painting the soul of a nation
programme.desc: Private visit takes you to discover the exhibition "Poland 1840-1918, painting the soul of a nation" at the Louvre Museum in Lens. The aim of this exhibition is to show, through prestigious loans from Polish collections, how the painters of this period, at a time when Poland no longer exists, were able to put the national narrative into images and ensure that modern Poland was reborn.

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: The man with the long greying beard who we find in this self-portrait is the painter Camille Pissarro (1830-1903). A keen follower of the Impressionist movement, the artist specialised in landscapes around Paris, often painted in winter, such as the “Chestnut Tress at Louveciennes” or the urban landscapes of Montmartre. Towards the end of his life, his painting technique changed and he turned towards Neo-Impressionism, for example in the “Seine River and Louvre Palace”.Enjoy your visit!

programme.title: Architectures
programme.desc: Tapie au pied de la "Coline de l’éléphant

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.sub-title: Léonard à la National Gallery de Londres
programme.desc: Un événement remarquable s'est produit à la National Gallery de Londres lorsque la plus grande collection jamais constituée de peintures de Léonard de Vinci a été réunie dans une exposition unique : Léonard de Vinci : peintre à la cour de Milan. Léonard est reconnu comme étant peut-être le plus grand peintre et sculpteur de tous les temps, mais ses talents ne s'arrêtaient pas là. Ce film raconte sa vie et s'étend sur Léonard le visionnaire, Léonard l'inventeur. Depuis l'endroit où il a vécu ses dernières années au Château du Clos Lucé en France, nous verrons que Léonard de Vinci était peut-être l'incarnation même de l'esprit de la Renaissance.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.sub-title: Rembrandt at the National Gallery, London & Rijksmuseum, Amsterdam
programme.desc: Every Rembrandt exhibition is eagerly awaited, but this exhibition organized by London's National Gallery and Amsterdam's Rijksmuseum was an unprecedented event. The documentary highlights the historic Rembrandt exhibition, while tracing his life. Rembrandt is one of the greatest artists who ever lived, and this deeply moving documentary seeks to explore the truth about the man behind the legend.

programme.title: My little Museum
programme.desc: My little Museum is Art History retold through funny anecdotes and backstage trivias by Alicia Flipo. With her wacky demeanor, her inventiveness and her quirky sense of humor, Alicia stages these small Art tales so that once and for all, you could remember the Big stories!

programme.title: Artist's Workshop
programme.desc: In the Artist's workshop series, we offer you a privileged meeting with an artist, or the discovery of an artist or an important place for the history of art. Whether they are painters, visual artists, sculptors... These people all have the same passion for art and this series is an opportunity to enter their different universes, to discover what drives them, inspires them and maybe that will give rise to vocations.

programme.title: Artist's Workshop
programme.desc: In the Artist's workshop series, we offer you a privileged meeting with an artist, or the discovery of an artist or an important place for the history of art. Whether they are painters, visual artists, sculptors... These people all have the same passion for art and this series is an opportunity to enter their different universes, to discover what drives them, inspires them and maybe that will give rise to vocations.

programme.title: The decisive moment
programme.desc: In each episode of the decisive moment, we welcome a photographer whom we have asked to select three photos that have marked their life and their career. Whether they are reporters, portraitists or fashion photographers, they all have the same passion and will share it with us.

programme.title: The decisive moment
programme.desc: In this episode, we will meet Geoffroy Van Der Hasselt, press photographer. He worked for a Belgian newspaper for which he covered local and international news. Today, he works for AFP, Agence France-Presse, and covers French politics, news, sports events and international affairs.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: L'humoriste et animateur Jim Moir et sa femme Nancy Sorrell partent en road trip dans le Kent aujourd'hui.Mieux connu sous le nom de Vic Reeves, Jim apporte sa touche d'humour unique à l'achat d'antiquités. De son côté, Nancy, mannequin et présentatrice télé, sait aussi marchander et elle est très compétitive ! Le couple est accompagné par les experts Charlie Ross et Thomas Plant.Soyez attentif au don surprenant de Jim pour deviner l’âge de presque tout, à Dixon traversant les chutes du Niagara et à une leçon de navigation par longitude.Et surtout, la mystérieuse Mme Parker fera-t-elle son apparition à la vente aux enchères ?

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Le rockeur progressif Rick Wakeman et son grand ami Ian Lavender, célèbre pour son rôle de Pike dans Dad’s Army, s’offrent une joyeuse virée sur les routes secondaires du Norfolk. Accompagnés des experts Raj Bisram et David Harper, ces deux chasseurs d’antiquités sillonnent le comté à la recherche de trésors à vendre aux enchères à Nottingham.Rick découvre d’anciens graffitis médiévaux cachés dans la cathédrale de Norwich, tandis qu’Ian fait un détour vers le nord du Norfolk pour admirer la plus grande collection de soldats miniatures au monde.Mais un sage vieil homme japonais aidera-t-il Ian à triompher aux enchères ?

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: Lucian Freud, l'un des peintres britanniques les plus célèbres de notre époque, est également l'un des rares artistes du XXe siècle à s'être représenté dans un autoportrait avec une telle constance. Ses autoportraits donnent un aperçu fascinant à la fois de sa personnalité et de son évolution en tant que peintre, depuis son premier portrait peint en 1939 jusqu'au dernier. Grâce à des entretiens fascinants avec d'anciens modèles, des amis et d'éminents experts, ce documentaire intensément captivant révèle l'œuvre d'un maître qui représente une étude captivante sur la dynamique du vieillissement et le processus d'autoreprésentation.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: The National Gallery in London is one of the world’s greatest art galleries. It is brimming with masterpieces, an inexhaustible treasure trove of history and an endless source of stories. This film gives a voice to those whose lives have been touched by the Gallery, from the security guard to the director, including daily visitors, celebrities and members of the royal family. Claudia Winkleman, Michael Palin, Terry Gilliam, Jacqueline Wilson and Her Royal Highness Princess Eugenie reveal their deeply personal connection to the National Gallery.

programme.title: Let me capture your world
programme.desc: Nicolas Henry, photographe et plasticien, voyage à travers le monde pour créer, avec les personnages, qu’il y rencontre des décors symbolisant leur histoire personnelle. Il immortalise cette rencontre et son installation par une photo. Au Ladakh, il découvre les protagonistes de trois projets qui concilient les traditions séculaires du pays, et la modernité. Chez les nomades du Changtang, dans une école alternative proche de Leh, la capitale, et dans un monastère perché sur un éperon rocheux, Nicolas découvre le Ladakh, ses habitants, nomades, moines, paysannes, ou jeunes étudiants, et créent avec eux une image symbolique de leur réalité.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.sub-title: Goya : visions de chair et de sang
programme.desc: Francisco Goya, considéré comme le fondateur de l’art moderne, est l’artiste espagnol le plus acclamé. En plus d’observer avec talent la vie et le passé mouvementé de l’Espagne, c’est un portraitiste doué et un commentateur social par excellence. Avec Goya, l’art du portrait atteint de nouveaux sommets. Cette exposition majeure de la National Gallery de Londres remet son génie en lumière. À travers une formidable collection d’oeuvres uniques et de lettres de Goya, nous analysons l’homme lui-même et le monde qu’il peignait.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: Cette exposition très attendue à la Royal Academy of Arts était la toute première rétrospective consacrée au portrait d'Édouard Manet. Couvrant l'ensemble de la carrière de cet artiste énigmatique et parfois controversé, l'exposition a rassemblé des œuvres provenant d'Europe, d'Asie et des États-Unis. Le portrait de Manet n'a jamais fait l'objet d'une exposition, bien qu'il représente environ la moitié de sa production artistique. Il a peint sa famille, ses amis et les personnalités littéraires, politiques et artistiques de l'époque, donnant vie non seulement à ses sujets mais aussi à la société parisienne.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: Qui était Frida Kahlo ? Voyagez dans la vie d'une véritable icône, découvrez son art et la vérité qui se cache derrière sa vie souvent mouvementée. La combinaison d'interviews, de commentaires et d'une exploration détaillée de l'art de Kahlo, offre un trésor de couleurs et un festin de vitalité. Ce documentaire personnel et intime offre un accès privilégié à ses œuvres, et met en lumière sa créativité fébrile, sa résilience et sa soif inégalée pour la vie.

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: Leader of the School of Pont-Aven, Paul Gauguin, the most exotic of French artists, paved the way for modern painting. There were two main themes which marked his work: Brittany and Tahiti. A rebel, he rejected copying reality in favour of exploring more delicate painting techniques. You will discover here the most important milestones in his work: from “Four Breton Girls” to “Tahitian Women on the Beach”, by way of the surprising “Self Portrait with Yellow Christ”. Enjoy your visit!

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: A key artist of the Italian Renaissance, Raffaello Santi (1483-1520) developed a classical art form, based on drawing, which made him the model for many painters in the following centuries. His favourite theme was the Madonna: you can admire, for example, “The Sistine Madonna” in Dresden and the “The Virgin and Child with St John the Baptist” in the Louvre. Notice the gentle harmony and the delicate sensuality in “The Three Graces” or the powerful human presence in “The Portrait of Baldassare Castiglione”.Enjoy your visit!

programme.title: Art Quiz
programme.desc: Test your knowledge and your memory in fine arts, architecture, photography, street art and a dozen other topics with our Art Quiz popups !

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Top Italian cooks Antonio Carluccio and Gennaro Contraldo are on a Road Trip around East Anglia. Restaurateurs, writers and old friends the ‘greedy Italians’ will be foraging for antiques in the company of experts David Harper and James Braxton. Watch out for some ‘explosive’ bargaining and an extremely tasty risotto! When he’s not shopping Antonio learns about the brave fisherman of Suffolk who saved mariners’ lives while risking their own. And, Gennaro has a trip to take a peek at a very special bird.

programme.title: Photo Contest
programme.desc: In each episode of Photo Contest, two contestants compete on an imposed theme such as rock'n roll, Japan or architecture. They have one hour to take the best possible photographs before editing them for 30 minutes in a studio. The photographs they have selected are then presented to Agnès Grégoire, editor-in-chief of PHOTO magazine, who will have to choose the best photographer.

programme.title: Artist's Workshop
programme.desc: In the Artist's workshop series, we offer you a privileged meeting with an artist, or the discovery of an artist or an important place for the history of art. Whether they are painters, visual artists, sculptors... These people all have the same passion for art and this show is an opportunity to enter their different universes, to discover what drives them, inspires them and maybe that will give rise to vocations.

programme.title: An hour with
programme.desc: Take an hour break to discover the work of a French painter, Georges Seurat. You will discover his labour with « Ile de France » landscape, Study for « a Sunday afternoon at the grande jatte », Study for « La grande jatte ».

programme.title: An hour with
programme.desc: Take an hour break to discover the work of a French painter, Jean-François Millet. You will discover his labour with Naked woman sleeping, Two bathers or The church at gréville.

programme.title: Video Art
programme.desc: Street art, performances, digital art... Because the new forms of Art and their invigorating character, even iconoclastic, have been able to attract a new public until now refractory to go inside the interior of our beautiful museums.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: The Impressionists are the most popular group in art history - millions flock every year to marvel at their masterpieces. But, to begin with, they were scorned, penniless outsiders. 1874 was the year that changed everything; the first Impressionists, “hungry for independence”, broke the mould by holding their own exhibition outside official channels. Impressionism was born and the art world was changed forever.What led to that first groundbreaking show 150 years ago? Who were the maverick personalities that wielded their brushes in such a radical and provocative way? The spectacular Musée d’Orsay exhibition brings fresh eyes to this extraordinary tale of passion and rebellion. The story is told not by historians and curators but in the words of those who witnessed the dawn of Impressionism: the artists, press and people of Paris, 1874. See the show that changed everything on the big screen.

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: Né à Aix-en-Provence dans le Sud de la France, Paul Cézanne (1839-1906) était un grand peintre français lors de la deuxième moitié du 19ème siècle. Artiste de base impressionniste, il initie le post-impressionnisme et le cubisme à travers ses oeuvres. Dans ses natures mortes et ses « Baigneurs », il innove grâce aux formes géométriques, permettant d’influencer les artistes cubistes qui le succèdent. Il a choisi de peindre la « Montagne Sainte-Victoire » une vingtaine de fois. Remarquez la magnifique simplicité de l’oeuvre « Nature morte aux pommes et aux oranges » ou la concentration illustré dans « Les Joueurs de cartes » tout deux exposés au Musée d'Orsay.Bonne visite !

programme.title: Architectures
programme.desc: La Prison de la Santé, construite à Paris entre 1861 et 1867, est un ensemble architectural unique, homogène, imposant. À la pointe de la réflexion théorique sur l’enfermement, elle fut à son époque la "prison moderne" par excellence, la traduction en pierre des nouvelles obsessions pénitentiaires du XIXème siècle : la prison panoptique, la rationalisation et l’humanisation de la détention, la rédemption du détenu.

programme.title: Little Sketches
programme.desc: In 64 fun episodes, Gia-Haï Phan teaches you all the sketching techniques you need.

programme.title: Sketchbook
programme.desc: Raphael Federici (street artist), Marine Goodmorning (illustrator), Luca Fiore (cartoonist) and Harry Boudchicha (drawing teacher) reveal their best drawing techniques. Each episode focuses on a specific subject:movement, oil painting, shadows, hair... For the first 10 minutes, each artist gives a theoretical lesson illustrated by sketches. Then they each start working on their creation. Finally, they end with a debrief, comparingand explaining their techniques.

programme.title: Art Quiz
programme.desc: Test your knowledge and your memory in fine arts, architecture, photography, street art and a dozen other topics with our Art Quiz popups !

programme.title: My little Museum
programme.desc: My little Museum is Art History retold through funny anecdotes and backstage trivias by Alicia Flipo. With her wacky demeanor, her inventiveness and her quirky sense of humor, Alicia stages these small Art tales so that once and for all, you could remember the Big stories!

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Strictly Come Dancing’s Zoe Ball and Ian Waite are quickstepping their way across the south West of England in a bid to turn a profit at auction in Hampshire. Experts Margie Cooper and Paul Laidlaw are on hand to guide. Paul shares a secret with Zoe about buying antique hair brushes. Ian, though, offers dancing lessons to dealers to secure a discount. Lordy! Zoe also hears how one village became world famous for lace production while Ian ends up meeting a giant horse with its own boat.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: The National Gallery in London is one of the world’s greatest art galleries. It is brimming with masterpieces, an inexhaustible treasure trove of history and an endless source of stories. This film gives a voice to those whose lives have been touched by the Gallery, from the security guard to the director, including daily visitors, celebrities and members of the royal family. Claudia Winkleman, Michael Palin, Terry Gilliam, Jacqueline Wilson and Her Royal Highness Princess Eugenie reveal their deeply personal connection to the National Gallery.

programme.title: Let me capture your world
programme.desc: Nicolas Henry, photographe et plasticien, voyage à travers le monde pour créer, avec les personnages, qu’il y rencontre des décors symbolisant leur histoire personnelle. Il immortalise cette rencontre et son installation par une photo. Au Ladakh, il découvre les protagonistes de trois projets qui concilient les traditions séculaires du pays, et la modernité. Chez les nomades du Changtang, dans une école alternative proche de Leh, la capitale, et dans un monastère perché sur un éperon rocheux, Nicolas découvre le Ladakh, ses habitants, nomades, moines, paysannes, ou jeunes étudiants, et créent avec eux une image symbolique de leur réalité.

programme.title: Masterpiece
programme.desc: A l'époque des fastes, Coorte passait des heures à travailler sur ses natures mortes austères composées d'une botte d'asperges, de trois pêches ou d'un bol de fraises. Comment se fait-il qu'il faille huit couleurs différentes pour approcher le blanc des asperges de Coorte ? Et pourquoi sont-elles si transparentes ? La recherche des réponses conduit l'équipe dans une petite église et chez un cultivateur d'asperges dans les provinces néerlandaises, ce qui conduit à une découverte spéciale dans un laboratoire de chimie.

programme.title: Private Tour
programme.desc: Private visit takes you to discover the exhibition "Kasimir Zgorecki, photographing "Little Poland" 1924-1939" at the Louvre Museum in Lens. In the middle of the 20th century, Kasimir Zgorecki worked in the mining basin of northern France. This exhibition takes place in a particular context because it is the centenary of the signing of an agreement between France and Poland on emigration and immigration, which led to the massive arrival of Polish workers in France to work in the mines. This is the case of the photographer Kasimir Zgorecki.

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: Créé à la fin du XIXe siècle par le collectionneur Richard Wallace, ce musée privé de Londres conserve une très belle collection de peintures européennes. On peut entre autres y admirer Le cavalier riant de Frans Hals ou le Portrait de Titus, le fils de Rembrandt. La peinture française du XVIIIe siècle dans sa veine galante et rococo y est particulièrement bien représentée avec, bien sûr, le chef-d’œuvre de la peinture libertine de Fragonard, Les hasards heureux de l’escarpolette.Bonne visite !

programme.title: Architectures
programme.desc: La Prison de la Santé, construite à Paris entre 1861 et 1867, est un ensemble architectural unique, homogène, imposant. À la pointe de la réflexion théorique sur l’enfermement, elle fut à son époque la "prison moderne" par excellence, la traduction en pierre des nouvelles obsessions pénitentiaires du XIXème siècle : la prison panoptique, la rationalisation et l’humanisation de la détention, la rédemption du détenu.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: Hopper’s work is the most recognisable art in America – popular, praised, and mysterious. Countless painters, photographers, filmmakers and musicians have been influenced by his art – but who was he, and how did a struggling illustrator create such a bounty of notable work?This new film takes a deep look into Hopper’s art, his life, and his relationships. From his early career as an illustrator; his wife giving up her own promising art career to be his manager; his critical and commercial acclaim; and in his own words – this film explores the enigmatic personality behind the brush….

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: Après deux ans d’exposition itinérante, en 2015 "La Jeune Fille à la perle” est retournée au musée Mauritshuis de La Haye. Du haut de ses 350 ans, l’éternelle Jeune Fille a toujours su conserver son aura de mystère et son charme. La preuve, c’est le nombre de curieux (1,2 millions) qui ont accouru pour l’apercevoir lors de son séjour au Japon. Le documentaire cherche à découvrir les nombreuses énigmes de cet extraordinaire tableau et de son créateur mystérieux - Vermeer. Qui était cette fille ? Pourquoi et comment Vermeer a-t-il peint ce tableau ? Venez voyager dans le temps pour découvrir Johannes Vermeer, visiter le charmant musée de La Haye et répondre à toutes ces questions.

programme.title: My little Museum
programme.desc: My little Museum is Art History retold through funny anecdotes and backstage trivias by Alicia Flipo. With her wacky demeanor, her inventiveness and her quirky sense of humor, Alicia stages these small Art tales so that once and for all, you could remember the Big stories!

programme.title: Artist's Workshop
programme.desc: In the Artist's workshop series, we offer you a privileged meeting with an artist, or the discovery of an artist or an important place for the history of art. Whether they are painters, visual artists, sculptors... These people all have the same passion for art and this series is an opportunity to enter their different universes, to discover what drives them, inspires them and maybe that will give rise to vocations.

programme.title: Artist's Workshop
programme.desc: In the Artist's workshop series, we offer you a privileged meeting with an artist, or the discovery of an artist or an important place for the history of art. Whether they are painters, visual artists, sculptors... These people all have the same passion for art and this show is an opportunity to enter their different universes, to discover what drives them, inspires them and maybe that will give rise to vocations.

programme.title: The decisive moment
programme.desc: In this episode, we will discuss with Emeric Lhuisset, visual photographer. He lives in Paris but travels regularly to the Middle East for his work, especially to Iraq and Lebanon. He has a degree in art from the School of Fine Arts in Paris, but also in geopolitics. He teaches at the Paris School of Political Science on the themes of contemporary art and geopolitics.

programme.title: The decisive moment
programme.desc: Born in Damascus, Syria, Ammar Abd Rabbo lived in Libya and Lebanon before moving to France at the age of 12. He has been working as a press photographer since 1990, and has signed more than sixty covers for well-known magazines. Ammar Abd Rabbo is not a war photographer, but has covered several conflicts, such as Iraq (2003), Lebanon (2006), Libya (2011), as well as several trips to Syria, in 2013 and 2014, to show the daily life and resistance of the inhabitants, rather than the military life.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Strictly Come Dancing’s Zoe Ball and Ian Waite are quickstepping their way across the south West of England in a bid to turn a profit at auction in Hampshire. Experts Margie Cooper and Paul Laidlaw are on hand to guide. Paul shares a secret with Zoe about buying antique hair brushes. Ian, though, offers dancing lessons to dealers to secure a discount. Lordy! Zoe also hears how one village became world famous for lace production while Ian ends up meeting a giant horse with its own boat.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Actor and charmer Nigel Havers and his canny, deal-making chum (and ex-agent) Michael Whitehall explore the West Country. Travelling by Bentley and TVR, they’ll have £400 each and expert advice from Margie Cooper and James Braxton. But what will do best at the auction... Nigel’s old cockle bucket or Michael’s tambourine? Plus there’s a trip to see some Bristol Savages and bit of Georgian elegance with the story of ‘The King of Bath’.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: Qui était Frida Kahlo ? Voyagez dans la vie d'une véritable icône, découvrez son art et la vérité qui se cache derrière sa vie souvent mouvementée. La combinaison d'interviews, de commentaires et d'une exploration détaillée de l'art de Kahlo, offre un trésor de couleurs et un festin de vitalité. Ce documentaire personnel et intime offre un accès privilégié à ses œuvres, et met en lumière sa créativité fébrile, sa résilience et sa soif inégalée pour la vie.

programme.title: A special day
programme.desc: In this episode, we will spend a special day with Cécile Schall, director of Fotofever, a contemporary photography fair that opens its doors today. For Cécile, the stakes are high because she only has a few hours left to make sure everything is perfect. We will accompany her in her preparations.

programme.title: Museum stories
programme.desc: Since the beginning of its history, the Petit Palais has been imagined to highlight masterpieces of art. It is a true setting that magnifies creation in all its forms. Its extraordinary collection allows it to offer visitors a journey through the ages, confronting the great artists and the creative genius of all time, and thus breaking down the ages barrier.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: C’est l’un des artistes les plus controversés et pourtant, l’un des plus influents. La collection de Picasso contenait principalement des Renoir. Matisse le vénérait. Monet également. Renoir a été crucial dans la création du mouvement impressionniste, avant de le rejeter totalement pour se lancer dans un genre radicalement différent, avec beaucoup de succès. La Collection Barnes à Philadelphie possède plus de toiles de Renoir que n’importe quelle autre galerie au monde et c’est là que nous tenterons de lever le voile sur l’histoire remarquable de cet incroyable artiste.

programme.title: Veilhan A Venezia
programme.desc: Follow the artist Xavier Veilhan who represented France in 2017 at the Venice Art Biennale, an Italian foundation that organizes various artistic events in Venice.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: En 2013, la Norvège célébra le 150e anniversaire de la naissance d'Edvard Munch (1863-1944), l'une des figures proéminentes de l'art moderne. Munch 150, coproduite par le Musée national et le Musée Munch, est déjà acclamée comme « l'exposition d'une vie ». L'intérêt général est énorme, comme le témoigne le résultat record de la mise aux enchères publiques de l'un de ses quatre tableaux, Le Cri, soit 120 millions de dollars. Cette présentation vous amènera dans les coulisses de la mise en place de cette exposition, en plus de comprendre une visite guidée de la Norvège qui brossera la biographie de cet homme dont la vie s'est étalée de la moitié du 19ème siècle jusqu'à l'occupation allemande lors de la Seconde Guerre mondiale.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: Pour les 500 ans de la mort de Raphaël, une grande exposition a ouvert ses portes à Rome. « Exhibition on Screen » a eu un accès exclusif à cet événement, qui réunit plus de 200 œuvres majeures de ce maître de la Renaissance. Le film part à la découverte de l’exposition et éclaire d’une nouvelle lumière le travail de cet artiste souvent incompris ou, au contraire, idéalisé.

programme.title: Art Quiz
programme.desc: Test your knowledge and your memory in fine arts, architecture, photography, street art and a dozen other topics with our Art Quiz popups !

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: L'humoriste et animateur Jim Moir et sa femme Nancy Sorrell partent en road trip dans le Kent aujourd'hui.Mieux connu sous le nom de Vic Reeves, Jim apporte sa touche d'humour unique à l'achat d'antiquités. De son côté, Nancy, mannequin et présentatrice télé, sait aussi marchander et elle est très compétitive ! Le couple est accompagné par les experts Charlie Ross et Thomas Plant.Soyez attentif au don surprenant de Jim pour deviner l’âge de presque tout, à Dixon traversant les chutes du Niagara et à une leçon de navigation par longitude.Et surtout, la mystérieuse Mme Parker fera-t-elle son apparition à la vente aux enchères ?

programme.title: Photo Contest
programme.desc: In each episode of Photo Contest, two contestants compete on an imposed theme such as rock'n roll, Japan or architecture. They have one hour to take the best possible photographs before editing them for 30 minutes in a studio. The photographs they have selected are then presented to Agnès Grégoire, editor-in-chief of PHOTO magazine, who will have to choose the best photographer.

programme.title: Artist's Workshop
programme.desc: In the Artist's workshop series, we offer you a privileged meeting with an artist, or the discovery of an artist or an important place for the history of art. Whether they are painters, visual artists, sculptors... These people all have the same passion for art and this show is an opportunity to enter their different universes, to discover what drives them, inspires them and maybe that will give rise to vocations.

programme.title: An hour with
programme.desc: Take an hour break to discover the work of a French painter, Théodore Géricault. You will discover his labour with An Officer of the Imperial horse guards, Heroic landscape with fisherman or The Horse race.

programme.title: An hour with
programme.desc: Take an hour break to discover the work of an Italian painter, Amedeo Modigliani. You will discover his labour with Caryatid, Lolotte or others portraits.

programme.title: Video Art
programme.desc: Street art, performances, digital art... Because the new forms of Art and their invigorating character, even iconoclastic, have been able to attract a new public until now refractory to go inside the interior of our beautiful museums.

programme.title: Luana's Kitchen
programme.desc: Wellness cuisine is not synonymous with sadness and insipidity. It can be extremely gourmet, for a balanced way to indulge yourself. On this theme, Luana welcomes young wellness pastry chef Johanna Le Pape. Together, they will prepare recipes that are both tasty and perfectly balanced: corn pizza with vegetables and peach-cassis and verbena puffs...

programme.title: Luana's Kitchen
programme.desc: Leftovers often end up in the garbage can. But with a little thought, it's easy to recycle them. This ecological and economical gesture can even delight our taste buds. Like us, Luana Belmondo hates throwing things away. She knows all about waste-free cooking and has mastered the art. She shows us how to reinvent boiled or steamed potatoes as something other than mashed potatoes. On the program: potato soufflé with paprika and vegetable gratin with curry.

programme.title: Health Explored
programme.desc: At Lake Titicaca, we attend a Pachamama ceremony to honor the Earth. This stunning site faces threats from pollution and invasive species. This episode reminds us of our interdependence with nature and the urgent need to protect it.

programme.title: Health Explored
programme.desc: The team reflects on the season’s highlights, emphasizing that health goes far beyond the physical. Each destination revealed the importance of community, purpose, and connection to our environment. An invitation to explore health in all its forms with curiosity and kindness.

programme.title: Health Explored
programme.desc: In La Paz, over 3,600 meters above sea level, we explore the effects of altitude on the human body. Ancestral remedies like coca leaves help relieve symptoms. This traditional medicine illustrates human resilience and the richness of local knowledge.

programme.title: The Wonderful World of Crafting
programme.desc: Michelle Ackerley, Rosie Wolfenden and four passionate hobby crafters head to the Haddon Hall Craft Fair in Bakewell, Derbyshire. Brian loves turning old furniture into new pieces, so Rosie offers tips on how to photograph and present his pieces for sale. James and Bridget have an alpaca farm and make yarn by spinning. Bridget learns about natural dyes, while James rushes to get production running with his sock-making machine. Mum-of-two Tracey is a paper crafter who makes original pieces for friends and family, but she urgently needs advice on pricing.

programme.title: Health Explored
programme.desc: Andean cultures produce foods adapted to high altitudes, such as royal quinoa. With a Bolivian chef, we prepare dishes that celebrate nutrition, culture, and community. In Bolivia, eating is a celebration of the land and its gifts.

programme.title: Health Explored
programme.desc: After a whirlwind 30 days across the globe, Mike and Braeden retreat into nature to reflect on the powerful stories, lessons, and encounters that shaped the season.

programme.title: The Wonderful World of Crafting
programme.desc: Three hobby crafters present their works for the first time at Brancepeth Castle Craft Fair in Durham. Occupational therapist Olivia dyes her own yarn and produces hand-woven pieces, ex-builder Neil makes quirky metal ornaments and Wendi now makes her own glass pieces uses the art of fusing - and for the fair she even learns the art of glass blowing.

programme.title: Health Explored
programme.sub-title: New Zealand - The Blue Mind Part II
programme.desc: We're still in New Zealand, where we look at the scientific and emotional benefits of water, illustrated by therapeutic surfing experiences and the Maori people's ancestral connection with aquatic environments. From mental well-being to physical health, we discover how New Zealand's abundant waters are more than just a natural spectacle; they're a source of holistic health and well-being.

programme.title: Massages
programme.desc: Massage studio will show you the best massage techniques in places which will make you dream. Let us take care of you! Lay down, relax and forget all your problems.

programme.title: Yoga
programme.desc: Practice Yoga from the comfort of your home with our experienced teatchers.

programme.title: Yoga
programme.desc: Practice Yoga from the comfort of your home with our experienced teatchers.

programme.title: Audio Advice
programme.desc: Relax and refocus with our thematic audio advices, set against the most beautiful backdrops in the world.

programme.title: My Zen Relaxation
programme.desc: Turn down the lights, kick your shoes back, take a cup of tea... You're on MyZen TV, time to relax.

programme.title: Beautiful landscapes
programme.desc: Watch beautiful landscapes from all over the world !

programme.title: My Zen Relaxation
programme.desc: Turn down the lights, kick your shoes back, take a cup of tea... You're on MyZen TV, time to relax.

programme.title: Spiritual Sports
programme.desc: Nurture the body AND the mind with Spiritual Sports.

programme.title: Audio Advice
programme.desc: Relax and refocus with our thematic audio advices, set against the most beautiful backdrops in the world.

programme.title: Namaste Yoga
programme.sub-title: Stabilize and Center: Strengthen Your Core and Open Your Hips
programme.desc: Stabilize and Center allows for the creation of a deeper connection with your core, as well as the present moment. Through the practice of conscious breathing, movement and attention to the postures, a state of centered awareness can be cultivated.

programme.title: Home training
programme.desc: This episode of "Home Training" focuses on the upper body and abdominals with a varied and balanced session. Guillaume and Sabrina start with a targeted warm-up to mobilize the joints and prepare the muscles for effort. The session is structured with two standing exercises and two on the floor, allowing you to work on strength and stability. Wide movements and rotations promote mobility while strengthening muscles. Ideal for toning the upper body and improving posture, this workout is accessible and motivating.

programme.title: Pilates
programme.desc: Stay in shape with our pilates courses!

programme.title: Namaste Yoga
programme.sub-title: Core Connection: Strengthen Your Center to Cultivate Core and Balance
programme.desc: A bold sequence, Core Connection uses confident poses to help you embrace your inner strength and let go of any tensions you might encounter. Use this balancing sequence to cultivate peace of mind, even through awkward or challenging situations.

programme.title: Spiritual Sports
programme.desc: Nurture the body AND the mind with Spiritual Sports.

programme.title: Home training
programme.desc: This episode of "Home Training" is dedicated to an intense and energetic cardio-training session. The movements include dynamic shifts forward, backward, and sideways, promoting cardio and coordination. Each block of the session increases in intensity, with a final surprise: the combination of four movements for a full challenge. Accessible and fun, this workout is perfect for boosting your energy while having a good time.

programme.title: Julie's Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Let's hit the roads of France to discover shellfish. We'll visit Brittany, then the Normandy coast where fishing is the regional sport, and Corsica, where the far northeast of the island lives to the rhythm of lobster. Julie takes us to cook lobster, crab with a very special recipe, and langoustines.

programme.title: Yoga
programme.desc: Practice Yoga from the comfort of your home with our experienced teatchers.

programme.title: Namaste Yoga
programme.sub-title: Stabilize and Center: Strengthen Your Core and Open Your Hips
programme.desc: Stabilize and Center allows for the creation of a deeper connection with your core, as well as the present moment. Through the practice of conscious breathing, movement and attention to the postures, a state of centered awareness can be cultivated.

programme.title: Julie's Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Honey was the first sweet condiment in history! It has also been known and consumed as a remedy since Antiquity. In France, we find an infinite variety of honey: acacia, chestnut, fir, rosemary, orange, spruce, oak, linden or lavender... We'll cross forests, fields and even towns, as bees also forage in urbanized areas. We'll then cook up emblematic recipes like Vercel gingerbread. Finally, we'll discover the European dark bee. Protecting this 80-million-year-old bee has become the spearhead of some passionate beekeepers.

programme.title: Deco Masters
programme.desc: It's off to the start of the first week of competition. But before the four amateur decorators take their turn with paintbrushes and nails, they have a meeting in the Brussels workshop. To kick off this week's competition, Armand, 33, is in the starting blocks. This young man from Montpellier is determined to prove that he is the ace decorator and no one else. Our competitor has the advantage of having a good dose of inspiration. And yes, as well as creating costumes, Armand has several great passions. This week's theme is wood. Will our man from Montpellier succeed in keeping to this theme, which is full of pitfalls?

programme.title: Julie's Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Julie reprend la route à bord de sa petite voiture rouge pour faire honneur à l’un de ses fruits favoris : la châtaigne. Julie ira à la rencontre de plusieurs producteurs en Ardèche, cuisinera la soupe traditionnelle de la région aux côtés de la pétillante Marithé. Elle fera aussi la recette des marrons glacés maison, avant de filer en Corse pour travailler la farine de châtaignes et les feuilles de son arbre. Ce périple s’achèvera comme toujours avec une recette de chef astucieuse et cette-fois ce sera Claude Brioude qui s’y collera ! Ce chef aime bousculer les codes et travaillera la châtaigne avec le poisson, deux produits de saison que l’on n’a pas forcément l’habitude de marier.

programme.title: Deco Masters
programme.desc: Today it's Pupa's turn. This 29-year-old from Liège has been immersed in the art world since she was a child. But beneath her calm, smiling exterior, Pupa has quite a character. And when it comes to decorating, you don't have to look for her. This week, Pupa, like her rivals, will have to spend €1,000 redecorating a parents' bedroom on the theme of wood. So is Pupa happy?

programme.title: Julie's Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Julie nous emmène en Bretagne sud et plus précisément dans le quartier maritime du Guilvinec pour faire avec vous la route du poisson depuis les filets jusqu’à vos assiettes. Le Guilvinec a beau être le premier port de pêche artisanale français, tous les bords de mers de l’hexagone réservent de bons produits de saison. Julie remonte donc en voiture pour découvrir dans le sud un certain nombre de poissons d’élevage dans une ferme aquacole en Méditerranée, tout en cuisinant le bar à Noirmoutier, la lotte dans le Nord et même le cabillaud dans l’immense marché de Rungis. Julie a challengé le Chef Olivier Bellin installé à Plomodiern dans le Finistère, pour qu’il cuisine un poisson méconnu : la vieille.

programme.title: Julie's Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Julie is offering you a trip to the south of France. Between the Rhone Valley and the Mediterranean, let's discover a fruit that is harvested in November: the olive.

programme.title: Julie's Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Today, Julie takes us down a different kind of yellow-brick road, one that tastes of childhood and gourmet delights: the road of sweets. France may be famous for its gastronomy, but it's not to be outdone when it comes to pastries and confectionery - quite the opposite. “Bêtises” from Cambrai, "Berlingots” from Carpentras, "Calissons” from Aix-en-provence, every region in France has its own sweet or confectionery.

programme.title: Julie's Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Eating flowers might appear unconventional, but we often consume them without even realizing it. Consider artichokes, for instance : they are essentially large, unopened flowers. Capers are the preserved buds of flowers soaked in vinegar, and cloves are dried flower buds. We also find courgette flowers, saffron pistils, orange blossom water used to flavor pastries, and the violet sweets that evoke memories of our childhood. In addition to adding aesthetic appeal and providing a dose of vitamins to our plates, flowers elevate the flavors of a dish and can even serve as a vegetable substitute.

programme.title: Luana's Kitchen
programme.desc: Quel bonheur de retrouver ce fruit printanier ! Les fraises redonnent des couleurs à nos assiettes et nous apportent une bonne dose de vitamines et d’antioxydants. Dans cet épisode, Luana Belmondo nous dévoile deux recettes sucrées autour des fraises.

programme.title: Luana's Kitchen
programme.desc: Pour les paresseux et tous ceux qui n’ont pas le temps, Luana Belmondo propose deux petites recettes simples et efficaces. Découvrez son pain à l'ail et au fromage, et ses spaghettis à l'ail.

programme.title: Julie's Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Today, we're off to discover summer fruits, which are harvested from June to August: peaches, melons, strawberries, raspberries... We'll then head to the cherry capital, Céret, and cook blueberries, strawberries and an apricot charlotte.

programme.title: Julie's Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Auxerre is cut by valleys whose best exposed slopes are home to vineyards. The meandering course of the Yonne runs vertically through this region. To the east of Auxerre, the Chablis region is rounded with hills. The vineyard, extending on both sides of the valley of the Serein. To the south, lined by the Nivernais canal, the upper Yonne valley attracts climbing enthusiasts and boaters, before being swollen by the waters of the Cure. The region is renowned throughout the world for the quality of its wines, particularly those of Chablis. Julie begins her journey in Auxerre and then proposes typical recipes from the area: croquignoles and cherry clafoutis.

programme.title: Home training
programme.desc: This episode of "Home Training" is dedicated to working the deep muscles. Guillaume and Sabrina alternate between standing and floor exercises, combining stretches, strengthening, and mobility. The carefully guided warm-up prepares participants for a gentle yet effective session, ideal for preventing injuries. Each movement aims to activate specific muscle groups while providing an immediate sense of well-being. This balanced program is perfect for reconnecting with your body while strengthening your muscle foundations.

programme.title: Julie's Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Direction le Loir-et-Cher pour une chasse à courre encadrée par les équipes de l’ONCFS. Prenons ensuite la route des Vosges pour cuisiner aux côtés de Mauricette une savoureuse gigue de cerf. Allons à la rencontre de Pierre en Côte d’Or où il fabrique des trompes de chasse, un outil indispensable à la vénerie. Julie retrouvera aussi deux chasseurs girondins pour une après-midi de chasse à la tonne dès plus originale avant de rejoindre Joël en Aquitaine pour une autre recette de gibier à plume. Nous parlerons ensuite avec Laurent du métier de piqueux : ce dresseur de chiens destinés à la vénerie. Cette fois-ci ce sera Frédéric Robert qui nous concoctera une recette de lièvre frotté au cacao et cuit dans un sarcophage d’argile.

programme.title: Yoga
programme.desc: Practice Yoga from the comfort of your home with our experienced teatchers.

programme.title: Namaste Yoga
programme.sub-title: Open and Ground: Stretch Your Shoulders and Strengthen Your Upper Back
programme.desc: A dynamic sequence for your upper body, Open and Ground will work your torso with a series of restorative and heart opening poses. By keeping a steady connection to the earth and lifting and opening the chest, the experience of opposing forces can be fully explored.

programme.title: Julie's Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Aujourd’hui, les plus gourmands ne devraient pas être déçus puisque c’est le chocolat qui est mis à l’honneur. Découvert par les mayas il y 2500 ans et plus largement ensuite par les Aztèques, le chocolat fait partie aujourd’hui des produits préférés des français. Et qu’on ne s’y trompe pas : au même titre que la cuisine a ses grands chef, le chocolat a aussi ses grands chocolatiers. Coté recettes, Julie fera découvrir un gâteau qu’on ne fait qu’à Saint Émilien et qui associe le chocolat au macaron, avant de rejoindre le Pays Basque pour un dessert qui ne manque pas de piment. Nous grimperons ensuite en montagne à la rencontre d’une cuisinière d’origine suisse qui fait des pains au chocolat à sa façon. Enfin, vous verrez que le chocolat nous réserve de nombreuses surprises : il possède de nombreuses vertus et s’utilise aussi pour le bien être.

programme.title: Julie's Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Tendre et savoureux, l’agneau tient une place prépondérante dans la cuisine festive mais aussi dans celle de tous les jours. Du Pays Basque au Cotentin en passant par Paris, Julie part donc sur les routes de France à la découverte des différentes races et types d'élevage existant à travers le pays. Il faut dire que la France a l'une des productions les plus variées au monde. Il existe plus d'une quarantaine de races répertoriées en 5 catégories : précoces, d’herbage, rustiques, mérinos et laitières. Mais plus qu’à la race, c’est à la façon dont ils sont alimentés qui intéresse les fins connaisseurs. Julie nous fait découvrir ses producteurs et cuisiniers de ce met raffiné !

programme.title: Luana's Kitchen
programme.desc: A good breakfast is a healthy, balanced meal made up of 5 energy-giving elements: protein, fiber, carbohydrates, healthy fats and hydration. Luana Belmondo offers us a healthy breakfast that will satisfy both salty and sweet palates: oatmeal, avocado and salmon, buddha bowl with chia seeds and seasonal fruit, and vegan panacakes.

programme.title: Luana's Kitchen
programme.desc: Luana Belmondo and her Italian friend Alessandra Pierini are preparing a pasta party. They'll be cooking pesto and sharing their tips on how to get it right. They'll also be making pasta saporita, full of color and flavor!

programme.title: Big Little Footprints
programme.desc: Big Little Footprints.

programme.title: Health Explored
programme.desc: The team reflects on the season’s highlights, emphasizing that health goes far beyond the physical. Each destination revealed the importance of community, purpose, and connection to our environment. An invitation to explore health in all its forms with curiosity and kindness.

programme.title: Health Explored
programme.sub-title: India - The Search for Mindfulness Part II
programme.desc: We journey to India, a land revered for its ancient spiritual wisdom and practices. From the tranquil valleys of Kullu Manali in the Himalayas to the vibrant, bustling streets of Delhi, we explore the multifaceted world of mindfulness, meditation, and yoga. As we navigate through contrasting environments, we discover how meditation is part of daily life, offering invaluable lessons about finding inner tranquility amid external chaos. We also delve into the transformative impact of mindfulness on underprivileged children, highlighting how these ancient practices empower young lives. Rooted in India's rich cultural heritage, the episode reveals how the nation's spiritual traditions provide both sanctuary and a deeper connection to ourselves and the broader world. Join us for this enlightening expedition as we unravel the power of mindfulness and how we can incorporate it into our daily lives no matter where we live.

programme.title: Health Explored
programme.desc: In La Paz, over 3,600 meters above sea level, we explore the effects of altitude on the human body. Ancestral remedies like coca leaves help relieve symptoms. This traditional medicine illustrates human resilience and the richness of local knowledge.

programme.title: Big Little Footprints
programme.desc: To educate our children about the profound impact of travel we travel to Miami, Florida. We'll learn about the area's colorful history, taste test its cuisine, learn Latin dancing and experience an epic adventure through the everglades - if we can make it out of alligator infested waters first!

programme.title: Health Explored
programme.desc: Andean cultures produce foods adapted to high altitudes, such as royal quinoa. With a Bolivian chef, we prepare dishes that celebrate nutrition, culture, and community. In Bolivia, eating is a celebration of the land and its gifts.

programme.title: Big Little Footprints
programme.sub-title: Eco-Explore Your Backyard - California Coast To Santa Barbara
programme.desc: In this episode we remind viewers just how much you can find when exploring your own backyard by road tripping the California Coast to Santa Barbara! Swapping TV time to chats around the campfire and an exciting encounter with sea lions.

programme.title: Health Explored
programme.desc: After a whirlwind 30 days across the globe, Mike and Braeden retreat into nature to reflect on the powerful stories, lessons, and encounters that shaped the season.

programme.title: Massages
programme.desc: Massage studio will show you the best massage techniques in places which will make you dream. Let us take care of you! Lay down, relax and forget all your problems.

programme.title: Health Explored
programme.sub-title: New Zealand - The Blue Mind Part II
programme.desc: We're still in New Zealand, where we look at the scientific and emotional benefits of water, illustrated by therapeutic surfing experiences and the Maori people's ancestral connection with aquatic environments. From mental well-being to physical health, we discover how New Zealand's abundant waters are more than just a natural spectacle; they're a source of holistic health and well-being.

programme.title: Namaste Yoga
programme.sub-title: Prana Flow: Open Your Shoulders and Hips
programme.desc: This vinyasa flow allows the practitioner to notice moments of stillness and transformation with every breath. Power and Prana calls for a constant presence of mind and steadiness of breath. It is in this state you learn when to stabilize and when to let go.

programme.title: Home training
programme.desc: This episode of "Home Training" offers an intense session focused on the lower body. Guillaume and Sabrina have designed a program alternating between two standing exercises and two on the floor, targeting the quadriceps, hamstrings, and glutes. After a complete warm-up to mobilize the joints and prepare the hips, the movements gradually increase in intensity. Each exercise is designed to strengthen and sculpt the muscles while improving mobility. With a motivating and friendly atmosphere, this session is perfect for those who want an effective and engaging workout.

programme.title: Pilates
programme.desc: Stay in shape with our pilates courses!

programme.title: Namaste Yoga
programme.sub-title: The Power of One: Hip Opening and Hand Balancing
programme.desc: Yoga instructor demonstrates powerful strengthening, revitalizing, relaxing and restorative exercises to provide a daily workout for any level of experience to open body and mind, build strength, stretch muscles and stimulate vibrant health.

programme.title: Deco Masters
programme.desc: On the third day of the competition, it's Magdalena's turn to try and prove that she's the ace of the interior design world. At 42, this Montoise native of Polish origin is the mother of two children and an artistic director. This time, she'll have to move on from layout to practical application. Magdalena will have to completely redecorate an adult bedroom. Great news, because this week's theme is wood. But the first she’ll have to convince Joëlle the owner, who knows exactly what she wants for her room.

programme.title: Deco Masters
programme.desc: Always self-confident, this 40-year-old father is an unrivalled handyman. However, for this resident of Barvaux, decorating hasn't always been his first passion. Today, our decorating enthusiast has found his own style. He prefers raw materials and natural elements. This week’s theme suits him like a glove. Geoffrey has every intention of winning this week's competition and becoming the ace decorator. And to win, he's going to have to convince Laetitia.

programme.title: Deco Masters
programme.desc: It's the long-awaited day of the grand final. But before seeing the reaction of the owners and finding out their scores, each candidate will find out what the other contestants thought of their choice in terms of decoration. And it's Armand who will be the first to join our decorating expert, Valérie Damidot, in the workshop. Armand is about to discover the criticisms of his opponents. We hope for his sake that his heart is in the right place.

programme.title: Julie's Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Julie takes us on a journey of spices and aromatic plants. Spices are a call to travel, to faraway lands and to the unknown. On her journey, Julie will introduce us to the famous black pepper.

programme.title: Julie's Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Let's hit the roads of France to discover shellfish. We'll visit Brittany, then the Normandy coast where fishing is the regional sport, and Corsica, where the far northeast of the island lives to the rhythm of lobster. Julie takes us to cook lobster, crab with a very special recipe, and langoustines.

programme.title: Julie's Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: This week, it is 80 kms from the capital, in Fontainebleau, that Julie is putting down her bags. Fontainebleau, a name famous throughout the world, a magical name which evokes for some a forest, for others a castle, a name which still shines with its royal history. The forest of Fontainebleau has inspired the art world since the beginning of the 19th century. Landscape painters such as Corot and Millet drew inspiration for their works there. But Fontainebleau has many other treasures in its bag, and gastronomy is part of its heritage. This is what Julie will discover through three recipes: Quail with grapes, raspberry and poppy pie and crayfish grave.

programme.title: Julie's Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: C'est à Giverny que démarre le voyage de Julie, celui dont le nom résonne immédiatement comme le berceau de l’Impressionnisme a gardé une authenticité émouvante, Giverny impose son style, murmure son histoire. Sa notoriété est fortement liée à la présence historique de Claude Monet et à tous les fabuleux témoins laissés par ce dernier. Claude Monet a aussi laissé son empreinte dans la cuisine à Giverny. Ses carnets de recettes sont là pour en témoigner. C’est dans ces carnets que Julie va s’inspirer pour remplir le sien, au menu : Lapin en compote, feuilleté d’andouilles au camembert, et charlottes aux abricots.

programme.title: Julie's Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Nous entamerons ce périple près de la Rochelle pour en apprendre un peu plus sur l’élevage des fameuses moules de bouchot mais aussi une technique bien particulière pour les cuisiner. Nous partirons ensuite pour un tour de France des meilleures huîtres : direction Cancale, Arcachon, Montpellier et enfin Oléron pour connaître les différentes méthodes d’élevage et s’y retrouver un peu plus parmi toutes les espèces de l’hexagone. Julie cuisinera une fricassée de berniques, les petits chapeaux chinois qui recouvrent les rochers du littoral mais aussi des palourdes roses méconnues du grand public. Nous poursuivrons notre route dans le Finistère pour rencontrer Sylvain, le seul éleveur d’ormeau du pays puis à Méru où se trouve encore des ateliers magnifiant ce sublime matériau. Le Chef Jean-Marie Baudic nous cuisine les coquilles Saint-Jacques comme personne.

programme.title: Julie's Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: C’est à nouveau sur les routes de France que l’on retrouve aujourd’hui Julie pour parler d’un produit incontournable des tables françaises : le fromage. Plus qu’un engouement gourmand, plus qu’une friandise de fins de repas, le fromage est associé à l’image de la gastronomie française, et d’ailleurs reconnu patrimoine immatériel par l’UNESCO. Les français ne s’y sont pas trompés : avec près de 1 000 variétés - des pâtes molles, aux pâtes cuites, persillées, ou encore pressées, et avec 45 Appellations, nous sommes les plus gros consommateurs de fromage au monde !

programme.title: Julie's Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Julie takes you through the Pyrénées Orientales, then Corsica, before making a stop on the Côte d'Azur, and concludes her journey between Rungis and Paris... all to explore the world of citrus fruits! These fruits add flavor, zest, and seasoning to any recipe, making them indispensable in the kitchen. They bring the warmth and sunshine of the South of France and the exoticism of distant lands. While we're all familiar with lemons, clementines, and grapefruits, Julie introduces us to a thousand other varieties.

programme.title: Luana's Kitchen
programme.desc: Luana Belmondo and her pastry chef friend Laurent Favre-Mot prepare desserts from our childhood. On the program: panettone in French toast, and torta della nonna with lemon cream and pine nuts, a typical Italian dessert!

programme.title: Luana's Kitchen
programme.desc: Dans cet épisode, nous allons voyager au Mexique avec les fajitas ! Un plat typique de la cuisine tex-mex. On va préparer ensemble des tortillas (galettes de maïs). Et pour la suite, des fajitas avec du poulet, des poivrons et des épices.

programme.title: 100 Places to See
programme.desc: The Haut-Rhin is the epitome of Alsatian charm. Riquewihr and its grands crus, Eguisheim and its half-timbered houses, Colmar and its Little Venice reveal a region where architecture, gastronomy and vineyards come together to offer an unforgettable journey.

programme.title: Health Explored
programme.sub-title: India - The Search for Mindfulness Part II
programme.desc: We journey to India, a land revered for its ancient spiritual wisdom and practices. From the tranquil valleys of Kullu Manali in the Himalayas to the vibrant, bustling streets of Delhi, we explore the multifaceted world of mindfulness, meditation, and yoga. As we navigate through contrasting environments, we discover how meditation is part of daily life, offering invaluable lessons about finding inner tranquility amid external chaos. We also delve into the transformative impact of mindfulness on underprivileged children, highlighting how these ancient practices empower young lives. Rooted in India's rich cultural heritage, the episode reveals how the nation's spiritual traditions provide both sanctuary and a deeper connection to ourselves and the broader world. Join us for this enlightening expedition as we unravel the power of mindfulness and how we can incorporate it into our daily lives no matter where we live.

programme.title: 100 Places to See
programme.desc: The Quercy region reveals architectural gems and enchanting landscapes. Rocamadour, a town clinging to its cliffs, Saint-Cirq-Lapopie, a picture-postcard village, and Castelnau-Bretenoux, a fairy-tale fortress, illustrate the richness of a land where tradition and history come together in perfect harmony.

programme.title: Big Little Footprints
programme.sub-title: Eco-Explore Your Backyard - California Coast To Santa Barbara
programme.desc: In this episode we remind viewers just how much you can find when exploring your own backyard by road tripping the California Coast to Santa Barbara! Swapping TV time to chats around the campfire and an exciting encounter with sea lions.

programme.title: Audio Advice
programme.desc: Relax and refocus with our thematic audio advices, set against the most beautiful backdrops in the world.

programme.title: Rovdyrenes hemmelige liv
programme.desc: Vår planets hav er nådeløse kampsletter som konstant tester selv de dødeligste kjøttetere. Dykk under de isete bølgene til Aleutene i Alaska for å bli vitne til en jaktteknikk som sjeldent, om noen gang, har blitt dokumentert blant spekkhoggere. Spekkhoggere bruker kun øyeblikk på å spise en grå hvalkalv før de drar kadaveret til havbunnen for å lagre kjøttet til magrere tider. Små kameraer festet på den døde hvalen filmet hele prosessen.

programme.title: Ville Argentina
programme.desc: I Argentinas fantastiske, men tøffe villmark må dyrene kjempe for å overleve hver eneste dag. Terrenget er karrig og ulendt, lufta er tynn og været kan endre seg på et blunk. En puma sniker seg gjennom dalføret på jakt etter en guanako, mens en tarantell forsvarer seg mot et sultent beltedyr. Revene spiser av byttene de finner inntil en stor rovfugl dukker opp. Samtidig holder isbreene på ferskvannet som dyrene så sårt trenger.

programme.title: Ville Argentina
programme.desc: Nord i Argentina finnes Ibera-reservatet med sumper, laguner og et like stort biologisk mangfold som i Pantanal.

programme.title: Wild Vietnam
programme.sub-title: Mysterious North: Land of Mountain Forests
programme.desc: Fra pangoliner, asiatiske palmesivetter og Delacours langurer til cat ba-langurer og de nylig oppdagede vitenamesiske krokodilleøglene. Vi ser på det utrolige utvalget av unike dyr som trives i de ekstreme forholdene som finnes i de skogkledde fjellene i Vietnam.

programme.title: Rovdyrenes hemmelige liv
programme.desc: Elvene og havene er som slagmarker der selv de største og farligste rovdyrene får testet hvor modige de er.

programme.title: Ville Argentina
programme.desc: I Argentinas fantastiske, men tøffe villmark må dyrene kjempe for å overleve hver eneste dag. Terrenget er karrig og ulendt, lufta er tynn og været kan endre seg på et blunk. programme.title: Rovdyrenes hemmelige liv
